name: Kihansi Spray Toad
conservationEfforts: Declared extinct in the wild in 2009 after a dam reduced waterfall spray. Bronx Zoo and Toledo Zoo maintain captive colonies. Reintroduction attempts underway with artificial spray systems.
description: This tiny toad lived only in the spray zone of Kihansi Falls in Tanzania. When a hydroelectric dam reduced the falls by 90%, the toad's micro-habitat was destroyed. It survives only in zoos.
